functions.summary: Split the large select loop into focused helpers for module loading, event dispatch, and detection output.
steps: Extract loadEBPFModules(evCtx, sourceList) to isolate goroutine startup and LoadWg coordination
Extract dispatchEvent(ev events.Event) ([]*analysis.Detection, error) for the type switch and analysis calls
Extract printEvent(ev events.Event) for ignore-list filtering and Event output
Extract handleDetections(detections []*analysis.Detection) for logging, artifact display, Clean, and Mitigate
Reduce the main select to channel routing only; delegate side effects to helpers
Add table-driven unit tests for dispatchEvent and handleDetections with mock Event and Detection values
functions.test_approach: Unit-test extracted helpers with stub events and detections; integration test monitor startup/shutdown with mocked BPF sources

functions.summary: Encapsulate the perf-map event cache state machine and extract return-path handling into testable helpers.
steps: Introduce eventReadState struct holding pwdCache, otherCache, and eventCache maps
Extract finalizeReturnEvent(state, event) Event for IsRet path: cache lookup, Exec comm merge, pwd/other attachment
Extract buildPwdPath(segments []string) string for pwd normalization and truncation
Extract cacheEntry(state, event) for IsPwd, IsOther, and default cache-insert branches
Keep readEvents as thin orchestration: perf map setup, goroutine loop calling state helpers, quit handling
Add unit tests for eventReadState transitions using mock Event implementations without eBPF
functions.test_approach: Table-driven tests for cache transitions and pwd path building; defer eBPF perf-map tests to integration suite
